meaning: n.海运,运送,航行,(总称)运输船只,船舶吨数,船只总数
examples: The shipping industry promulgated a voluntary code.
Shipping charges on orders sent to Canada are paid C.O.D.
She arranged for the shipping of her furniture to England.
International shipping can be arranged if that 1960s pencil-leg sideboard really catches your fancy.
Many in the shipping industry oppose the speed limit, saying it would be too costly.
